name: development-skills
description: Development workflow: three-tier triage (PASS_THROUGH / LIGHT / FULL 4-phase Research+Plan → Chronicle → Implement+Verify → Review+Finalize) with language auto-detection (Python, Java, TypeScript, Swift, frontend) and a staff-reviewer subagent.

interface.shortDescription: Disciplined development workflows for AI coding agents
interface.longDescription: Use Development Skills for coding, debugging, refactoring, test design, code review, documentation alignment, and cross-agent workflow discipline. Three-tier triage (PASS_THROUGH for trivial · LIGHT for mechanical changes · FULL 4-phase workflow) with language/framework auto-detection (Python, Java, TypeScript, Swift, frontend including React/Next.js/Raycast/Vite) and a named staff-reviewer subagent.
defaultPrompt: Use development-skills to implement this feature.
Use development-skills to debug this failure.
